findings.evidence: The HTML rendering duplicates the page content by first displaying a visual snapshot/image of the PDF page, followed by the semantic HTML text version.
The handwritten signatures next to the names in the 'FROM' field are missing in the HTML text section.
The contact information block ('Wetlands, Buffers, Stormwater...') and the 'One North Carolina Naturally' logo at the bottom of the PDF page are completely missing from the HTML text rendering.
The HTML rendering duplicates the page content by first displaying a visual snapshot of the PDF page content, followed by the semantic HTML text version.
